finance.summary: Global markets show mixed signals as oil prices drop over 5% on Iran negotiation talks, while US stocks see a slight pullback.
highlights: Global shares gained as oil prices fell more than 5% due to potential Iran-US de-escalation
US stocks closed mixed-to-lower, with S&P 500 down 0.4% and Nasdaq down 0.8%
Gold prices rose 3.6% to $4,561.90 per ounce as market volatility persists
Estee Lauder shares declined 9% amid merger talks with Puig

art.summary: Optimism builds ahead of Art Basel Hong Kong as the global market shows signs of stabilization and growth.
highlights: Art Basel Hong Kong 2026 kicks off Friday, serving as a key barometer for art market recovery
Global art sales reached an estimated $67.8 billion in 2025, up 3% year-on-year
US auction market saw a significant rebound with a 23% increase in sales to $3.17 billion
Impressionist and Modern art categories led the auction market rebound in 2025
